name: PER_ACCRUAL_PLANS_B
description: The base table used to store PTO accrual plan definitions, (Paid time off).

columns.Name: ACCRUAL_PLAN_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments:
Identify the ENTERPRISE  to which the plan belongs.  
Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES.

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identify the LDG to which the plan belongs.  Foreign key to PER_LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUPS.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Identify the Legislation code (of the LDG) to which the plan belongs. Foreign key to PER_LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUPS.

columns.Name: ACCRUAL_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Indicates whether a plan is Sickness or Vacation.

columns.Name: ACCRUAL_START_RULE
columns.Comments: Indicates accrual start rule.  This can be hire date, beginning of year, or six months after hire.

columns.Name: ACCRUAL_UNITS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the accrual units are hours or days.

columns.Name: ACCRUAL_ELEMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PAY_ELEMENT_TYPES.  Identifies the element that is used to enroll employees in the accrual plan.

columns.Name: CO_INPUT_VALUE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the input value that is used to record carryover entitlement from one period to the next.

columns.Name: CO_DATE_INPUT_VALUE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PAY_INPUT_VALUES_F. Identifies the element and input value which stores the date when carried over time becomes effective.

columns.Name: CO_EXP_DATE_INPUT_VALUE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PAY_INPUT_VALUES_F. Identifies the element and input value which stores the date when carried over time expires.

columns.Name: RESIDUAL_INPUT_VALUE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the element and input value that is used to record residual leave at the end of a period.

columns.Name: RESIDUAL_DATE_INPUT_VALUE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PAY_INPUT_VALUES_F. Identifies the element and input value which stores the date when residual time becomes effective.

columns.Name: TAGGING_ELEMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PAY_ELEMENT_TYPES.  Identifies the element that is used to flag retrospective net calculation rule element entries.

columns.Name: ACCRUAL_DEFINED_BALANCE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PAY_DEFINED_BALANCES. Identifies the defined balance used to store Accruals.

columns.Name: ACCRUAL_BALANCE_ELEMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PAY_ELEMENT_TYPES.  Identifies the element that is used to manage the maintenance of an accrual payroll balance.

columns.Name: LIABILITY_DEFINED_BALANCE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PAY_DEFINED_BALANCES. Identifies the defined liability amount for the stored Accruals   .

columns.Name: LIABILITY_BALANCE_ELEMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PAY_ELEMENT_TYPES.  Identifies the element that is used to manage the maintenance of an liability balance    .

columns.Name: ACCRUAL_TERM_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates the type of the accrual term . Typical values are 'simple' ,'Rolling','Hire Date Anniversary'.

columns.Name: ACCRUAL_TERM_LENGTH
columns.Comments: Indicates the accrual term length , for example '1 year'.

columns.Name: ACCRUAL_TERM_LENGTH_UOM
columns.Comments: Indicates the accrual term length , for example '1 year'.

columns.Name: ACCRUAL_FREQUENCY_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates the accrual period type . Typical values are 'Standard' ,'Payroll' .

columns.Name: ACCRUAL_FREQUENCY_LENGTH
columns.Comments: Indicates the accrual period length , for example '1 month'.

columns.Name: ACCRUAL_FREQUENCY_LENGTH_UOM
columns.Comments: Indicates the accrual period length , for example '1 month'.

columns.Name: ACCRUAL_TERM_START
columns.Comments: Start date of the accrual term . Only required in case of 'Simple' accrual term.

columns.Name: ACCRUAL_TERM_END
columns.Comments: End date of the accrual term . Only required in case of 'Simple' accrual term.

columns.Name: CO_EXPIRY_LENGTH
columns.Comments: Expiry length (date) of the carry over entitlement , for example "6 months".

columns.Name: CO_EXPIRY_LENGTH_UOM
columns.Comments: Expiry length (date) unit of measure of the carry over entitlement.

columns.Name: INELIGIBLE_PERIOD_LENGTH
columns.Comments: User defined period of ineligibility, in conjunction with the ineligible period uom.

columns.Name: INELIGIBLE_PERIOD_LENGTH_UOM
columns.Comments: Period uom for the INELIGIBLE_PERIOD_LENGTH, for example, weeks or months.

columns.Name: ACCRUAL_FORMULA_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to FF_FORMULAS_F. Identifies the formula used to calculate accrued time.

columns.Name: CO_FORMULA_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to FF_FORMULAS_F. Identifies the formula to be used to calculate values for the PTO carryover process.

columns.Name: PAYROLL_FORMULA_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to FF_FORMULAS_F. Identifies the formula specified in run result rules used by payroll processing.

columns.Name: INELIGIBILITY_FORMULA_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to FF_FORMULAS_F. Identifies the formula used to calculate whether an employee is eligible to accrue time.

columns.Name: ACCRUAL_BAND_GROUP
columns.Comments: Accrual Plan's Band group

columns.Name: ACCRUAL_BAND_RANGE
columns.Comments: Accrual Plan's Band Range

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
